gmail_label_query_note: Use label:Avaris (display name) in Gmail search_threads queries, not label:Label_1 (the ID) — the ID form returns zero results even though list_labels reports it correctly.
notes: gmail_cursor is the timestamp of the newest alert email processed so far; each daily run should only consider messages newer than this, then advance it. Umbrex added 2026-07-22 — application was declined (membership requires full-time independent consulting status not currently met), not an active source. MoveMeOn now has full access granted but is not yet sending email alerts with brief text — worth checking the platform directly. BTG occasionally sends 'new projects available' notifications with no brief text included; these can't be auto-scored and need a manual portal login to review. Catalant confirmed to be actively matching/declining him on real projects even though it never emails full brief text.
upwork_alert_noise_note: Across 3 runs, 4-6 of the daily Upwork alerts per run have been sales/BD/SDR/admin roles with no rate or pay-floor-failing rate. The account's job-alert keyword settings appear broad; recommend the user tighten them if this pattern continues.
